src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/MPDA.general_idea: Corrected a grammatical error in the Javadoc comment from 'a administrative' to 'an administrative'.
Changed the parameter type of parseOutputs from Collection to List to allow for more specific type handling.
Refactored parseOutput to return the next line and add the result to the list directly, simplifying the loop in parseOutputs.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/MPDA.human_impl: parseOutput returns String and adds to outputs list internally

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/album/MPDA.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Collectors.toList() with the Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
Remove the unused import for java.util.stream.Collectors after switching to Stream.toList().
Correct a grammatical error in the Javadoc comment from 'a album' to 'an album'.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/album/MPDA.human_impl: represents a album database -> represents an album database

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/artist/MPD.general_idea: Remove the import for Collectors since it is no longer used after switching to Stream.toList().
Replace Collectors.toList() with the Java 16+ Stream.toList() method in listAllArtists.
Replace Collectors.toList() with the Java 16+ Stream.toList() method in listAllAlbumArtists.
Replace Collectors.toList() with the Java 16+ Stream.toList() method in listArtists.
Replace Collectors.toList() with the Java 16+ Stream.toList() method in getArtist.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/genre/MPDG.general_idea: Remove the import for Collectors since it is no longer used in the code.
Mark the instance field as final to enforce immutability after injection.
Replace the legacy Collectors.toList() collector with the JDK 16+ Stream.toList() method.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/monitor/Th.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/player/MPD.general_idea: Remove the SongConverter parameter from the constructor as it is no longer used in the class.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/player/MPD.human_impl: Removed 'SongConverter songConverter' from constructor arguments and its import.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.general_idea: Replace deprecated Collectors.toList() with the Java 16+ Stream.toList() method to modernize code.
Remove the unused import for java.util.stream.Collectors after migrating to Stream.toList().
Add SLF4J logger to enable error logging for missing files.
Remove PlaylistSongConverter from constructor as it is no longer used.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.human_impl: Removed PlaylistSongConverter playlistSongConverter from @Inject constructor parameters.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.general_idea: Handle IndexOutOfBoundsException when searching for songs to prevent crashes on missing files.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.human_impl: Wrapped songDatabase.searchFileName(song).get(0) in try-catch and used Optional to filter missing songs.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.general_idea: Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() for cleaner code.
Simplify Javadoc references by using short class names instead of fully qualified names.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.human_impl: Changed {@link org.bff.javampd.server.MPD} to {@link MPD} in class documentation.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/server/MPD.general_idea: Replace parseInt with Float.parseFloat and cast to int to handle floating-point string values for MIX_RAMP_DB.
Replace manual getter method with Lombok @Getter annotation to reduce boilerplate.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/server/MPD.human_impl: Added @Getter to version field and removed getVersion() method.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/server/MPD.general_idea: Remove redundant null check in conditional expression.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/song/MPDSo.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Collectors.toList() with the Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
Remove the unused import for java.util.stream.Collectors after migrating to Stream.toList().
